JSyn - Java Audio Synthesis

Creating and Connecting Units

  • Create a sine-wave oscillator.
    SineOscillator sineUnit = new SineOscillator();
  • Connect noise output to State Variable Filter input.
    • noise.output.connect( filter.input );
  • Set Frequency of sine oscillator to 440.0 hertz.
    • sineUnit.frequency.set( 440.0 );
